scripts.backend: cd backend && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cublas/lib:./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cudnn/lib:./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cuda_runtime/lib:./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cufft/lib:./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cusolver/lib:./.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cusparse/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH && export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 && uv run python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --log-level info
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && uv run pytest tests -q
scripts.backend:stop: if [ -f backend/backend.pid ]; then kill $(cat backend/backend.pid) && rm backend/backend.pid; fi
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue --kill-others-on-exit "bun run backend" "bun run frontend"
scripts.test: bun run frontend:typecheck && bun run backend:test
